title: Cobblemon Trainer Battle SERVERONLY
description: Cobblemon side mod that offers trainer battle system for SERVERONLY environment
body:
# !!! IMPORTANT !!!

Starting from 1.9.0, SERVERONLY version will be distributed within [Cobblemon Trainer Battle](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-trainer-battle).

# README

Cobblemon Trainer Battle is a side mod for Cobblemon that offers trainer battle system with additional features. This mod is SERVERONLY version of [Cobblemon Trainer Battle](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-trainer-battle). Only the commands from the full version are available.

## Features

- Customizable Trainer Battle
- Battle Factory Mini Game

## Documentation

Refer to [GitHub Pages](https://kiwiflavoredapollo.github.io/cobblemon-trainer-battle/) for documentation
